description.zh-cn: Matcha毕业于中央美术学院，其插画风格融合了油画的厚重感与日系二次元的唯美，形成了独特的个人标签。她以描绘精致、甜美的日系少女形象见长，画面色彩浓烈而和谐，光影运用细腻，常营造出水晶般通透又梦幻的氛围。构图繁复却不显杂乱，充满了华丽的故事感，角色面部刻画精巧，服饰细节丰富，整体兼具艺术感与视觉冲击力。
description.en: Matcha graduated from the Central Academy of Fine Arts. Her illustration style blends the weight of oil painting with the elegance of Japanese anime, forming a distinct personal signature. She excels at depicting delicate and sweet anime girls, with rich yet harmonious colors, refined lighting, and a crystal-clear, dreamlike atmosphere. Her compositions are intricate without feeling cluttered, full of a luxurious sense of storytelling, with carefully rendered facial features and detailed clothing, balancing artistry and visual impact.

description.zh-cn: 混合可可是国内初音未来同人圈极具代表性的画师。她的初音作品被粉丝誉为“梦幻银河开在眼前”。从日常的清新甜美，到充满氛围感的贺图，她将初音未来这个角色诠释出了多种可能性。
description.en: Rumoon is a highly representative artist in the domestic Hatsune Miku fan-art community. Her Hatsune Miku works are praised by fans as 'a dreamlike galaxy unfolding right before your eyes.' From everyday fresh and sweet pieces to atmosphere-rich celebratory illustrations, she brings out many different possibilities for the character.
